name: ModifyComment
description: Editing a comment by a feedback selected.
postconditions: The notification system has been modified for the comment feedback selected.
Interruption of the connection to the server

UC26: View the list of sites as a result of the use case SearchSite, it selects and activates a function of change in the selected comment.
Upload feedback issued to that site and displays them in a form.
Select a feedback from the list and submit the form.
Displays a form for editing the comment of feedback selected.
Edit the comment and submit the form.
Verify the data entered and asks for confirmation of the change. Where the data is invalid or insufficient, the system activates the use case Errored.
